_comment: 100% synthetic funnel performance data for Funnel Agent. Targets and fallback monthly totals only; normal monthly metrics are aggregated from data/funnel_synthetic.csv so daily and monthly views reconcile. No real customers, real partners, or production data.

stage_definitions.traffic: Distinct synthetic users/entities that enter the funnel. Some stop here and never submit to the demo system.
stage_definitions.submission: Users/entities that successfully submit the request/application to the demo system.
stage_definitions.approval: Submitted users/entities approved by the demo system.
stage_definitions.completion: Approved users/entities that disburse in the demo.
